records.m_Talk_ENG: Impossible... you are interfering with my very existence using CRF...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impossible... you are interfering with my very existence using CRF...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impossible... you are interfering with my very existence using CRF...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What on earth is this sword art...?!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What on earth is this sword art...?!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What on earth is this sword art...?!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The essence of the Nanahara Style is the Nether God's swordsmanship that cleaves souls.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The essence of the Nanahara Style is the Nether God's swordsmanship that cleaves souls.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The essence of the Nanahara Style is the Nether God's swordsmanship that cleaves souls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If a Shadow wandering this world refuses to lie in its proper grave...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If a Shadow wandering this world refuses to lie in its proper grave...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If a Shadow wandering this world refuses to lie in its proper grave...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...then I'll sever that forcibly-raised fate with my blade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...then I'll sever that forcibly-raised fate with my blade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...then I'll sever that forcibly-raised fate with my blade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Push up under cover! Leave not a single Apostle alive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Push up under cover! Leave not a single Apostle alive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Push up under cover! Leave not a single Apostle alive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant General, these people are surely...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant General, these people are surely...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant General, these people are surely...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Looks like support from the Administration has arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Looks like support from the Administration has arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Looks like support from the Administration has arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems... our lifeline's a fair bit longer than we thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems... our lifeline's a fair bit longer than we thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems... our lifeline's a fair bit longer than we thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gordias Division here. Per Master's orders, we've met up with the Delta Seven members.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gordias Division here. Per Master's orders, we've met up with the Delta Seven members.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gordias Division here. Per Master's orders, we've met up with the Delta Seven members.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll handle things on this side. Miss Nao, please focus your party on the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll handle things on this side. Miss Nao, please focus your party on the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll handle things on this side. Miss Nao, please focus your party on the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. I'm leaving this to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. I'm leaving this to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. I'm leaving this to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm counting on you, Sanae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm counting on you, Sanae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm counting on you, Sanae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kamiizumi has just arrived on-site with the division members aboard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kamiizumi has just arrived on-site with the division members aboard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kamiizumi has just arrived on-site with the division members aboard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With you and the Lady Nanahara's sisters there, we shouldn't have to worry about that front.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With you and the Lady Nanahara's sisters there, we shouldn't have to worry about that front.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With you and the Lady Nanahara's sisters there, we shouldn't have to worry about that front.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, about this Baba Yaga. Are we actually headed the right way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, about this Baba Yaga. Are we actually headed the right way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, about this Baba Yaga. Are we actually headed the right way?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hate to say this now, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hate to say this now, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hate to say this now, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't love the idea of that one doing the flying. Kinda nervous here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't love the idea of that one doing the flying. Kinda nervous here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't love the idea of that one doing the flying. Kinda nervous here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox is super smart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox is super smart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox is super smart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Relax. It might not look it, but this model incorporates the latest Northern Union tech.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Relax. It might not look it, but this model incorporates the latest Northern Union tech.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Relax. It might not look it, but this model incorporates the latest Northern Union tech.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Letting the machine auto-pilot is a hundred times better than unlicensed drivers at the stick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Letting the machine auto-pilot is a hundred times better than unlicensed drivers at the stick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Letting the machine auto-pilot is a hundred times better than unlicensed drivers at the stick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You're still here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You're still here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You're still here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You dragged me along, what are you on about? You think I wanted to come this far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You dragged me along, what are you on about? You think I wanted to come this far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You dragged me along, what are you on about? You think I wanted to come this far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't wanna be here, jump out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't wanna be here, jump out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't wanna be here, jump out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I were a vampire like you, maybe I would!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I were a vampire like you, maybe I would!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I were a vampire like you, maybe I would!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this lineup really okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this lineup really okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this lineup really okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How should I know? The water's already spilled so there's no use crying over it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How should I know? The water's already spilled so there's no use crying over it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How should I know? The water's already spilled so there's no use crying over it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have mountains to sort out. But for now, eyes on the problem right in front of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have mountains to sort out. But for now, eyes on the problem right in front of us.
